column1: # BOGA path-trigger registry — machine-readable form of "which gate for what
# you changed" (the human tables live in AGENTS.md and
# docs/specs/02-quality-and-test-gates.md; keep all three in sync in the same
# change — docs-check validates that the lanes cited here exist).
# Consumed by `./boga test for [--diff <range>] [paths...]` and `./boga pr check`.
#   pattern:  glob over repo-relative paths. `**` matches across `/`,
#   requires: comma-separated gate aliases (fast|backend|frontend) and/or lane
#   rule:     short human name — this is what a ⛔ N/A justification cites.
#   A changed path may match many rows; the requirement is the UNION.

column3: mobile config (native dep change ⇒ also rebuild dev client + frontend, see spec 02)
lane registry (regenerate the matrix: ./boga docs gen)
